name: Satish Kumar
text: Very professional dental clinic in Ramanayapeta, Kakinada. Dr. Vijay Srinivas explained the root canal treatment process very clearly. The treatment was painless and the staff were very polite. Highly recommended.

name: Durga Prasad
text: Got my dental implants done here. Excellent hospital with modern equipment. Dr. Vijay Srinivas is very experienced and the surgery was completely comfortable. Pricing is very reasonable compared to others.

name: Lakshmi Prasanna
text: I visited Apex dental hospital for my daughter's teeth alignment. The invisible aligners treatment is going great. The clinic is extremely clean and hygienic. Friendly doctors and staff.

name: Ramana Murthy
text: Best dental care in Kakinada. The laser dentistry treatment was painless. The hospital has a very neat environment and strictly follows sterilization protocols. Very satisfied with the service.

name: Srinivas Rao
text: Dr. Vijay Srinivas is a very skilled dentist. I went for teeth whitening and got excellent results in a single session. Very professional and polite behavior from the entire team.

name: Anitha K.
text: Apex dental hospital is the best choice for any dental problems in Kakinada. Their root canal treatment is painless. The hospital is neat and clean, staff responds very quickly to our needs.

name: Prasad V.
text: Very clean and sterile clinic in Ramanayapeta. Dr. Vijay Srinivas is very caring and explains everything before starting the treatment. The implants procedure was smooth and painless.

name: Veera Babu
text: Got emergency dental care here for a severe toothache. They responded very quickly and did the treatment immediately. Highly recommend their services.

name: K. Sravani
text: Modern equipment and expert dental care in Kakinada. Dr. Vijay Srinivas's explanation is very clear. The clinic maintains European sterilization standards. Best hospital.

name: Mohan Reddy
text: Excellent experience at Apex Dental Hospital. Affordable pricing for high-quality treatment. Dr. Vijay Srinivas and his team are very cooperative and friendly.

name: Swathi P.
text: Got crowns and bridges done here. Perfect fitting and natural look. The hospital is very clean and follow strict hygiene protocols. Very satisfied.

name: R. Karthik
text: Best prosthodontist in Kakinada. Dr. Vijay Srinivas is very calm and professional. Painless root canal treatment. Highly recommend this clinic.
